has_contradictions.description: True if the request contains contradictory requirements that cannot both be satisfied

has_missing_critical_info.description: True if essential information is missing that would be needed to fulfill the request

requires_clarification.description: True if the request is ambiguous and could be interpreted multiple ways

has_logical_impossibility.description: True if the request asks for something logically impossible

contradictions_found.description: Specific contradictions identified in the request (empty if none)

missing_information.description: Critical information that is missing from the request (empty if none)

clarification_questions.description: Questions that would need to be answered to proceed (empty if none)

assumptions_made.description: Assumptions made to interpret or fulfill the request

confidence_level.description: Self-assessed confidence in understanding and fulfilling the request

gate_inputs.description: Individual gate fields for CLI-side computation

description: Complete LLM response with domain result and gate inputs. The CLI evaluates gate_inputs to determine whether the response can proceed.
